title: Financial Sector Vendor Risk Assessment
description: Enhanced 25-question assessment for vendors operating in regulated financial services environments. Aligns with APRA CPS 234, AUSTRAC AML/CTF, PCI DSS, and ISO 27001:2022.

questions.text: Do you encrypt all financial data at rest using AES-256 or equivalent? Please describe your key management practices.
Do you encrypt all data in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher? Describe certificate management.
Do you maintain a current data classification policy? Describe categories and handling requirements for PII and financial data.
What Data Loss Prevention (DLP) controls are in place for financial data exfiltration prevention?
Do you have a documented data retention and secure disposal policy? Specify retention periods for financial records.
Do you hold relevant financial services licences or certifications (e.g., PCI DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II)? List current certifications with expiry dates.
Do you have an AML/CTF compliance program? Describe transaction monitoring and suspicious activity reporting capabilities.
How do you comply with APRA CPS 234 requirements for information security? Describe your policy framework and governance.
Can you support our regulatory reporting obligations (e.g., AUSTRAC, ASIC) by providing audit logs and data extracts on request?
Do you have a documented process for responding to regulatory inquiries or investigations involving your platform?
What is your Recovery Time Objective (RTO) and Recovery Point Objective (RPO) for critical financial systems?
How frequently do you test your business continuity and disaster recovery plans? Provide date of last full test.
Do you maintain geographically diverse data centres? Describe replication architecture and failover capabilities.
What is your documented uptime SLA for financial transaction processing systems?
How do you manage capacity planning to prevent service degradation during peak financial processing periods (e.g., month-end, settlement)?
Do you enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all privileged access to financial systems? Describe MFA mechanisms.
Do you implement Privileged Access Management (PAM)? How are privileged credentials stored and rotated?
Do you conduct quarterly access reviews for all users with access to financial data or systems?
How do you manage access provisioning and de-provisioning for staff changes? Describe your joiner/mover/leaver process.
Do you log and monitor all privileged user activity? How long are audit logs retained?
What is your maximum time to notify clients of a data breach affecting financial data? Confirm compliance with APRA CPS 234 72-hour notification requirement.
Describe your Security Operations Centre (SOC) capabilities. Do you operate a 24x7 SOC or use a managed service?
Have you experienced any security incidents affecting financial data in the past 24 months? If so, describe nature and resolution.
